implementedSlices: provider-neutral ContextBlock, ContextPipelineManifest, ContextPrefixHash, cache hint, cache evidence, and statusline telemetry DTOs
compatibility projector from ContextProjectionResult.selectedNodes into kernel/project/session/current-turn layers
deterministic block hashes, layer prefix hashes, pipeline fingerprints, and manifest comparison
content-addressed context block and manifest cache entries
prompt assembly manifest consumer with ordered pipeline evidence and fallback behavior
runtime compatibility switch for contextPipeline.enabled carrying evidence into prompt assembly and model metadata
model-gateway cache hit/miss normalization attached to pipeline fingerprints
provider cache hint serialization gated by explicit capability metadata
runtime-message-bus context pipeline stream payloads with replay-safe backpressure metadata
session compact-boundary replacement that records source block hashes
structured prefix drift and high-priority exclusion diagnostics
CLI/TUI bounded statusline rendering for cache hit rate, model, thinking mode, context size, and budget pressure
additive protocol envelope pipeline metadata without raw context content
remainingWork: provider-specific cache-control wire format must remain disabled unless a provider profile explicitly declares support
future hosts may add richer diagnostics views for prefix evidence, but current CLI/TUI statusline is bounded and local
